title: DirectorLoopRun
description: Director Loop run artifact. input_hash covers the input domain; output_hash covers the state-transition domain. Both are SHA-256 over compact canonical JSON (serde struct-definition field order, no pretty-printing). Coherence values are fixed-point millionths (0..=1_000_000); 950_000 represents 0.95. No floats anywhere in the hash boundary.

director_loop_version.description: Director Loop orchestration protocol version. Tracked independently of VDCE kernel version.

fixture.description: Full fixture object. Contains fixture_id; do not duplicate fixture_id at top level.

config.description: Full config object. Fully serialized into input_hash preimage.

threshold.description: Coherence pass threshold in fixed-point millionths.

initial_coherence.description: Coherence at loop entry in fixed-point millionths.

final_coherence.description: Coherence at loop exit in fixed-point millionths.

corrections.description: Fully serialized; no partial projection permitted in hash preimage.

regen_events.description: Fully serialized; no partial projection permitted in hash preimage.

input_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of InputHashPreimage canonical JSON.

output_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of OutputHashPreimage canonical JSON.

Fixture.description: Extend with fixture-specific fields before freezing for a given fixture set. All fields here are included in input_hash.

Config.description: Extend with config-specific fields before freezing for a given run set. All fields here are included in input_hash.
